title: Fermentation & Microbiology

analysis.object: T243: Fermentation and microbiology depth analysis

quorum_sensing.reason: Autoinducer concentration oscillates at threshold — EML-3

biofilm_formation.reason: Phase transition: emergent collective behavior — categorification

metabolic_flux.reason: Glycolytic oscillations: NAD+/NADH oscillatory cycle = EML-3

sporulation.description: B. subtilis: discrete switch to spore state

analysis.biofilm_depth_question: Is biofilm formation a Δd=∞ event? Answer: YES — it is a categorification. Individual planktonic bacteria: EML-1 (exponential individual growth). Biofilm: collective organism with quorum sensing (EML-3) and irreducible emergent properties. The transition planktonic → biofilm = EML-1 → EML-∞ (emergent collective). This is a depth jump of ∞: categorification, not a finite step.

analysis.verdict: Fermentation: exponential EML-1. Quorum sensing: EML-3. Biofilm: EML-∞ categorification.
analysis.theorem: T243: Fermentation Depth — quorum EML-3; biofilm = categorification EML-1→EML-∞

key_theorem: T243: Fermentation Depth (S522). Bacterial growth: EML-1. pH: EML-2. Quorum sensing: EML-3. Biofilm: categorification (EML-1 → EML-∞). Glycolytic oscillations: EML-3. Key: biofilm = collective organism = categorification = EML-∞ emergent.
